properties.description: Schema containing all the abstract and core type definitions comprising the MAP Core Dance Schema.
Abstract holon type for descriptors of executable dances, linking to a request-contract holon type and a response holon type.
Concrete holon type for invocation records that capture the dance being invoked, the target holon, the request holon, and ingress context.
Abstract holon type for successful response holons returned from dances. Response bodies and diagnostics are ordinary holons.
Concrete holon type for non-fatal diagnostic notes attached to successful dance responses.
Concrete shell holon type for value-shaped property-map holons used as request, parameter, response-body, or projected-result shapes.
Deprecated old-world abstract holon type for structured response bodies returned from dances. New-world response bodies are ordinary concrete holon types.
Concrete binding of a DanceType with executable details (engine, module, entrypoint, ABI, version/compat).
Declares that a HolonType affords (supports) a DanceType (i.e., the verb is valid for instances of the type).
Inverse of Affords, from DanceType to HolonType.
Deprecated old-world relationship that binds a TypeDescriptor to a specific DanceImplementation that can be dispatched.
Deprecated old-world inverse of ImplementsDance, from DanceImplementation to TypeDescriptor.
Pins a DanceImplementation to exactly one DanceType interface it satisfies.
Inverse of ForDance, from DanceType to DanceImplementation.
Links a DanceType to the HolonType used as its request contract.
Inverse of RequestType, from HolonType to DanceType.
Links a DanceType to the DanceResponseType used to structure its response.
Inverse of Response, from DanceResponseType to DanceType.
Links a DanceResponseType to the concrete holon type that will serve as the structured response body.
Inverse of ResponseBody, from HolonType to DanceResponseType.
Links a DanceInvocation holon to the DanceType it invokes.
Links a DanceInvocation holon to the target holon it acts on, when the dance is target-based.
Links a DanceInvocation holon to the concrete request holon supplied for that invocation.
Links a DanceResponseType to zero or more DanceDiagnostic holons that carry non-fatal notes.
Unique string identifier for a DanceType descriptor, used in dispatch tables.
Human-readable explanation of what the dance does or when it should be invoked.
Ingress context for a DanceInvocation, recorded as an InvocationSource enum value.
Severity classification for a DanceDiagnostic holon.
Stable machine-readable code for a DanceDiagnostic holon.
Human-readable message for a DanceDiagnostic holon.
Deprecated old-world machine-readable status code indicating the result of the dance. New-world success/failure classification is carried by the outer Result contract.
Execution engine for the implementation (e.g., WasmWasi, Process, RustDylib, Builtin).
Content-address or locator of the executable module (e.g., hash/URL/capability address).
Function/export name to invoke inside the module.
Identifier of the stable smart contract ABI expected by the module/entrypoint.
Semantic version or content hash pin of the implementation.
Compatibility range or constraints (e.g., ABI or schema versions).
Human-readable summary of a dance outcome.
Enum value type that records how a DanceInvocation entered the runtime.
Invocation entered the runtime through a client command ingress path.
Invocation entered the runtime through a trust-channel ingress path.
Invocation originated from trusted internal runtime code.
Enum value type for the severity of a DanceDiagnostic holon.
Informational non-fatal diagnostic note.
Warning-level non-fatal diagnostic note.
Deprecated old-world enum value type for dance status codes. New-world success and failure are expressed by the outer Result contract.
200 — Request succeeded.
202 — Request accepted but not yet processed.
400 — The request was malformed or invalid.
401 — The requester is not authenticated.
403 — The requester lacks permission.
404 — The target resource was not found.
409 — Conflict with the current state of the resource.
422 — Semantic validation failed.
500 — Unexpected internal error.
501 — Functionality required to fulfill the request is not supported.
503 — The server is currently unable to handle the request (overload/maintenance).
Enum value type for execution engines used by DanceImplementations.
Execute a WASM module under WASI (preferred).
Spawn a separate OS process with protocol pipes.
Dynamically load a Rust dylib via FFI (platform-coupled).
Call a registered host builtin function.
Concrete commit response-body holon type retained under its existing key during parallel buildout. Instances are projection-shaped response holons.
Number of holons the commit operation attempted to save.
Enum value type for commit request outcomes (Complete, Incomplete).
All staged holons committed; no staged holons remain.
One or more staged holons could not be committed; some may remain in New or Changed state pending error resolution.
Overall status of the commit request (Complete or Incomplete).
Declared relationship from a CommitResponse to each holon successfully saved by this commit.
Inverse of SavedHolons. Links a holon to a CommitResponse that successfully saved it.
Declared relationship from a CommitResponse to each holon that was not saved due to validation or commit errors.
Inverse of AbandonedHolons.  Links a holon to a CommitResponse that did not successfully save it.
